manga.title: Distractions
manga.description:
I need to focus on work, but I keep getting distracted by my coworkers!

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Toomics](http://toomics.com/click/intro?cno=6376&pid=webtoonguide), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/comic/C000057402), [Anytoon](https://www.anytoon.co.kr/webtoon/episode/8639), [Qtoon](https://www.qtoon.co.kr/toon/list.mg?tcode=rf2p)
